description: Ground-truth labels for retrieval evaluation. Each query lists the passage IDs that SHOULD appear in top-k retrieval results. A retrieved list is scored via recall@k — what fraction of expected_ids appear in the top-k returned by the retriever. Candidates should report recall@3 and recall@5.

queries.query: I feel overwhelmed with anxiety and can't sleep at night
My mother passed away recently and I can't stop crying
I used to feel close to Allah but now my prayers feel empty
As a Muslim in a non-Muslim country I don't know where I belong
I can't stop worrying about my future and my career
Life keeps throwing one hardship after another at me
I've made so many sins I feel like Allah won't forgive me
How can I be more patient when things aren't going my way
I feel like Allah has abandoned me and my du'as aren't answered
I'm struggling with a major life decision and don't know what to do
